set_saioshi_prompt: Set your 'Saioshi' to see special information here.

add_website_prompt: Register your favorite Oshi's official website to display it on the home screen!
reward_ad_free_subtitle: Watch a video to disable all banner ads in the app for 24 hours.
reward_exp_boost_subtitle: The experience points (record count) gained from your next activity record will be doubled, helping you level up a little faster.
reward_custom_tag_subtitle: You can create one of your own original emotion tags. You can use the created tag at any time.
get_reward_by_watching_video: Watch a video to get a reward!
reward_earned_ad_free: Reward earned! Banner ads will be hidden for 24 hours.
reward_earned_exp_boost: Reward earned! The experience points from your next activity record will be doubled.
reward_earned_custom_tag: Reward earned! You can create one original emotion tag.

privacy_policy_description: This application recognizes the protection of user privacy as a top priority and adheres to the following privacy policy.
privacy_policy_section1_content:
The following information may be collected by this application.

* **Information you provide**: All information you enter into this application, such as the name of your Oshi, the content of your activity records, image paths, billing history, goods information, schedules, and itinerary content.
* **Device information**: Information necessary for the operation of this application, such as your device type and OS version.
* **Location information**: If you use the "Memory Map" feature, we may collect location information to the extent necessary to provide that feature. The collection of location information is based on your consent.
privacy_policy_section2_content:
The collected information will be used for the following purposes.

* To provide and improve the features of this application.
* To manage and display your Oshikatsu records.
* To analyze and visualize your Oshikatsu trends.
* To respond to inquiries.
* To analyze the usage of this application and create statistical data.
* For other tasks necessary to provide this application.
privacy_policy_section3_content: This application will not disclose or provide personal information to third parties without your consent, except as required by law.
privacy_policy_section4_content: This application will take necessary and appropriate measures to prevent the leakage, loss, or damage of collected information and to otherwise ensure its safe management.
privacy_policy_section5_content: This policy may be revised as necessary. Any revisions will be announced within this application or notified to users by an appropriate method.
privacy_policy_section6_content: For inquiries regarding this policy, please use the feedback function within the application or contact the developer.
about_app_description: This app is a tool to record and manage your Oshikatsu. By recording your daily activities, it helps you maintain motivation and look back on your Oshikatsu.
feature_oshi_management_description: You can save and manage information about your "Oshi".
feature_schedule_event_description: You can record and manage events, concerts, and other important dates.
feature_goods_management_description: You can catalog and manage your Oshi-related goods.
feature_expense_tracking_description: You can record and track expenses for your Oshikatsu and goods purchases.
feature_mission_description: You can set and manage goals and tasks related to your Oshikatsu.
feature_record_description: You can record all your Oshikatsu activities.
feature_series_management_description: You can organize goods and events by series.
feature_theme_settings_description: You can customize the app's appearance with 'Neon Mode' and 'Normal Mode', and set the theme based on your Oshi's color.
invalid_new_series_name_message: Please enter a valid new series name.
delete_series_dialog_content:
Delete series "{seriesName}"?
{goodsCount} goods are associated with this series. The series for these goods will be set to "None".
series_deleted_message: Series "{seriesName}" deleted. The series for associated goods has been unlinked.
repeat_setting_subtitle: Automatically adds a billing record every month
cancel_repeat_setting_dialog_content:
Cancel this repeat setting?
Automatic monthly additions will be stopped.
no_collection_message:
You don't have a collection yet.
Let's add new goods from the button below!
no_missions_message:
No support missions yet.
Let's add a new mission from the button below!
onboarding_page1_description: Easily record your thoughts on concerts, memories of events, and daily happenings with photos and a diary. Never forget those precious moments.
onboarding_page2_title: Smartly Manage Your Schedule and Trips
onboarding_page2_description: From your Oshi's birthday to concerts and pilgrimage plans. Never miss an important date with the calendar and itinerary features.
onboarding_page3_title: Manage All Your Oshis in One Place
onboarding_page3_description: It's okay to be a DD! Register multiple Oshis and manage their activity records and schedules individually. Create your own personal Oshikatsu space!
what_is_oshikatsu_level_description: It is an index that represents the current amount of enthusiasm for your Oshikatsu based on your records. Continuing to record will raise your level, leading to new discoveries and maintaining motivation.
how_level_is_determined_description: The Oshikatsu level is determined by comprehensively evaluating the following factors.
how_level_is_determined_bullet1: Frequency and continuity of records: Recording every day will speed up your level-up.
how_level_is_determined_bullet2: Diversity of records: You can get a higher evaluation by recording various categories of Oshikatsu.
how_level_is_determined_bullet3: Contribution to Oshi: Specific actions such as participating in events, purchasing goods, and sending fan letters are evaluated.
how_level_is_determined_bullet4: Recording emotions: Your feelings and impressions of your Oshikatsu are also important factors.
level_1_description: Just a casual interest, like seeing them on social media and finding them intriguing.
level_2_description: Starting to realize the charm of the Oshi, getting 'hooked' and finding 'perfect interpretations'.
level_3_description: Constantly saying 'precious... impossible... my vocabulary...', and starting to buy merchandise.
level_4_description: Can't stop feeling 'heart-wrenched' by every move of the Oshi. Mild emotional turmoil.
level_5_description: Too much merchandise, information, and visuals, leading to a state of 'information overload' that's 'bad for the heart'.
level_6_description: Crying or laughing at every new piece of information about the Oshi. Increased event participation. 'Glad to be alive'.
level_7_description: Reacting to all of the Oshi's words and actions with 'I get it', 'Exactly', 'Genius', and 'Thank you'.
level_8_description: Life is swayed by the Oshi. 'I'm about to explode' and 'The world is made of my Oshi' become everyday phrases.
level_9_description: The center of life is the Oshi. 'A life where my Oshi is precious today too' and 'It's tough, but I'm happy'.
level_10_description: Oshi's happiness = world peace. Can only say 'Thank you for being born into this world'.
level_up_merits_description: With each level up, you may earn special badges and unlock exclusive content within the app. You can also visually confirm the growth of your Oshikatsu.
to_enjoy_oshikatsu_more_description: Actively keep records and try various Oshikatsu activities. We hope this app will help enrich your Oshikatsu life.
cannot_navigate_message: Cannot navigate to other pages on this screen.
delete_record_confirm_message: Are you sure you want to delete this record?
tag_already_exists_message: That tag is already in use.
title_and_category_are_required: Please select a title and category.
delete_event_confirm_message: Are you sure you want to delete this event?
name_and_classification_required: Please enter a name and classification.
delete_oshi_confirm_message: Are you sure you want to delete this Oshi?

Let's create a new one!
delete_itinerary_confirm_message: Are you sure you want to delete this itinerary?
memo_content_hint: Enter your notes freely here (bullet points, free text, etc.)
discard_changes_dialog_content: Your changes have not been saved. Do you want to go back?
terms_of_service_description: By using this application, you must agree to the following terms of service.
terms_section1_content: These Terms shall apply to all relationships between the user and the developer regarding the use of this application.
terms_section2_content:
In using this application, the user shall not perform the following acts.

1. Acts that violate laws or public order and morals
2. Acts related to criminal acts
3. Acts that infringe on copyrights, trademark rights, or other intellectual property rights included in this application
4. Acts that destroy or interfere with the functions of the servers or networks of the developer, other users of this application, or other third parties
5. Acts of commercially using information obtained through this application
6. Acts that may interfere with the operation of this application
7. Acts of unauthorized access or attempts to do so
8. Acts of collecting or accumulating personal information, etc. concerning other users
9. Acts of using this application for fraudulent purposes
10. Acts that cause disadvantage, damage, or discomfort to other users of this application or other third parties
11. Acts of directly or indirectly providing benefits to antisocial forces in connection with the developer's services
12. Other acts that the developer deems inappropriate
terms_section3_title: Article 3 (Suspension of Provision of this Application, etc.)
terms_section3_content:
The developer may suspend or interrupt the provision of all or part of this application without prior notice to the user if it is determined that any of the following reasons exist.

1. When performing maintenance, inspection, or updating of the computer system related to this application
2. When it becomes difficult to provide this application due to force majeure such as earthquake, lightning, fire, power failure, or natural disaster
3. When the computer or communication line, etc. stops due to an accident
4. In other cases where the developer determines that it is difficult to provide this application

The developer shall not be liable for any disadvantage or damage suffered by the user or a third party due to the suspension or interruption of the provision of this application.
terms_section4_content:
The developer does not explicitly or implicitly guarantee that this application is free from factual or legal defects (including defects related to safety, reliability, accuracy, completeness, effectiveness, suitability for a specific purpose, security, etc., errors, bugs, infringement of rights, etc.).

The developer shall not be liable for any damage caused to the user due to this application, except in cases of intentional or gross negligence on the part of the developer.

The developer shall not be liable for any trouble that arises between the user and another user or a third party regarding this application.
terms_section5_content: The developer may change these Terms at any time without notifying the user if it is deemed necessary.
terms_section6_content:
The interpretation of these Terms shall be governed by the laws of Japan.

In the event of a dispute regarding this application, the court having jurisdiction over the location of the developer's head office shall be the exclusive agreed jurisdictional court.
